title: cyperus convallium
intro: Cyperus convallium, also known as the "Lilyturf" or "Blue Lilyturf Grass", is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the genus Cyperus. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is believed to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, treating coughs, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cyperus convallium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also applied topically to wounds and skin irritations. Additionally, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
